name: Southern Love
tagline: The only serious soul food on Oahu — shrimp and grits that locals call the best in Hawaii, cooked to order in Kakaako.
mustOrder: shrimp and grits — widely called the best in Hawaii
catfish po'boy — Southern classic done right
parking: Street parking on Queen St; paid lots in Kakaako
talkStory: Chef Corey Love, originally from Tennessee, and partner Elizabeth Martinez opened in 2023 and immediately filled a gaping hole in Oahu's food scene — real Southern soul food. Everything cooked to order: fried chicken, catfish, shrimp and grits that locals call the best in Hawaii. Featured on Hawaii News Now. Short hours, closed Sun-Mon, tiny space — classic signs of a legit operation. Already at 4.8 Google stars with a devoted local following.
